name: Organic Strawberries (1 lb)
description: Plump, sweet organic strawberries picked at peak ripeness. No pesticides, no artificial anything. Perfect for snacking, smoothies, or topping your morning yogurt.

name: Hass Avocados (4-pack)
description: Ready-to-eat Hass avocados with rich, creamy flesh and nutty flavor. Perfect ripeness for guacamole, toast, or salads. Packed with healthy fats and potassium.

name: Baby Spinach (5 oz)
description: Triple-washed and ready-to-eat baby spinach leaves. Mild flavor great for salads, smoothies, or sautéing. Rich in iron, calcium, and vitamins A & C.

name: Navel Oranges (3 lb bag)
description: Sweet, seedless navel oranges bursting with vitamin C. Easy-peel thick skin makes them perfect for snacking on the go. Juicy and naturally sweet.

name: Roma Tomatoes (per lb)
description: Firm, meaty Roma tomatoes with low moisture and concentrated flavor. Ideal for cooking sauces, roasting, and fresh slicing. Locally sourced when in season.

name: Organic Whole Milk (1 gallon)
description: Certified USDA Organic whole milk from pasture-raised cows. No artificial hormones or antibiotics. Creamy, rich flavor that's great for drinking, cooking, or baking.

name: Chobani Greek Yogurt Variety Pack (8-count)
description: 8 single-serve cups in assorted flavors: strawberry, blueberry, peach, and mixed berry. 12g protein per serving. Made with only natural ingredients, no artificial flavors.

name: Tillamook Extra Sharp Cheddar (16 oz)
description: Award-winning sharp cheddar aged for a bold, complex flavor. Made from milk of cows never treated with rBST. Perfect for snacking, melting, or cheese boards.

name: Free-Range Large Eggs (12-count)
description: Grade A large eggs from hens raised on pasture with outdoor access. Rich golden yolks and firm whites. Certified humane. Freshness guaranteed.

name: USDA Choice Ribeye Steak (per lb)
description: Well-marbled USDA Choice ribeye cut fresh daily. Exceptional tenderness and rich beefy flavor. Ideal for grilling, pan-searing, or broiling. Average 1–1.2 lb per pack.

name: Atlantic Salmon Fillet (per lb)
description: Fresh-cut Atlantic salmon fillet with skin on. High in Omega-3 fatty acids and protein. Mild, buttery flavor that pairs well with lemon, herbs, or soy glaze.

name: Organic Boneless Chicken Breast (per lb)
description: Certified organic, air-chilled boneless chicken breast. No antibiotics, ever. Lean protein at its best — great for grilling, baking, stir-fry, or meal prep.

name: Wild Gulf Shrimp (1 lb, peeled & deveined)
description: Wild-caught Gulf shrimp, peeled, deveined, and flash-frozen for freshness. 21–25 count per pound. Naturally sweet with a firm texture. No preservatives added.

name: Artisan Sourdough Boule
description: Stone-oven baked sourdough with a crackling crust and chewy interior. Made with live starter culture and no preservatives. Tangy, complex flavor. Baked fresh daily.

name: Butter Croissants (6-pack)
description: Flaky, buttery French-style croissants baked fresh every morning. 72-hour laminated dough with European-style butter. Perfect with jam, ham, or just on their own.

name: Everything Bagels (6-pack)
description: New York-style everything bagels loaded with sesame seeds, poppy seeds, onion, garlic, and salt. Dense, chewy interior with a golden crust. Kettle-boiled before baking.

name: Amy's Organic Burritos (4-pack)
description: Certified organic burritos in cheddar & bean, breakfast, and black bean varieties. Made with non-GMO ingredients and wrapped in whole wheat tortillas. Quick microwave meal.

name: Häagen-Dazs Ice Cream Pint (assorted)
description: Premium ice cream made with only 5 simple ingredients. Available in vanilla, chocolate, strawberry, coffee, and dulce de leche. No artificial flavors or colors.

name: Birds Eye Steamfresh Vegetables (10 oz)
description: Flash-frozen vegetables that steam right in the bag. Available in broccoli, mixed vegetables, corn, and green beans. No sauce added — just pure vegetables. Ready in 5 minutes.

name: California Olive Ranch Olive Oil (16.9 oz)
description: 100% California extra virgin olive oil. Harvested and bottled within weeks for maximum freshness. Fresh, fruity flavor with a mild peppery finish. Non-GMO and USDA certified.

name: Barilla Pasta Variety Pack (3 boxes)
description: Three 16oz boxes of Barilla pasta: penne, spaghetti, and rigatoni. Made in Italy with 100% durum wheat semolina. Al dente texture. Non-GMO verified.

name: Quaker Old Fashioned Oats (42 oz)
description: 100% whole grain oats for a hearty, filling breakfast. Low glycemic index with 4g of fiber per serving. Versatile for oatmeal, overnight oats, granola, or baking.

name: Rao's Homemade Marinara Sauce (24 oz)
description: Slow-simmered Southern Italian marinara with San Marzano tomatoes, olive oil, and fresh basil. No added sugar, low in carbs. The #1 pasta sauce in the US.

name: Tropicana Pure Premium Orange Juice (52 oz)
description: 100% pure squeezed orange juice with no added sugars or preservatives. Pasteurized for safety. Available in original, no pulp, and some pulp varieties. High in vitamin C.

name: San Pellegrino Sparkling Water (12-pack, 11.15 oz)
description: Natural mineral sparkling water from the Italian Alps since 1899. Fine, persistent bubbles with a crisp, clean finish. Zero calories, zero sweeteners. Great for sipping or pairing with meals.

name: Bigelow Green Tea Variety Pack (40-count)
description: 40 individually sealed tea bags across 6 green tea varieties: Classic, Mint, Lemon, Pomegranate, Decaf, and Constant Comment. Rich in antioxidants. Gluten-free.

name: RXBAR Protein Bar Variety Pack (12-count)
description: Whole food protein bars with 12g protein per bar. Made with egg whites, dates, and nuts — that's it. No B.S. flavors include chocolate sea salt, peanut butter, blueberry, and more.

name: Siete Grain-Free Tortilla Chips (5 oz)
description: Light and crispy grain-free chips made with cassava and coconut flour. Perfect with salsa, guac, or solo. Paleo, vegan, gluten-free. Sea salt, lime, and nacho flavors available.

name: Boar's Head Roasted Turkey Breast (per lb)
description: Sliced to order at the deli counter. All-natural roasted turkey breast with no fillers, extenders, or artificial colors. 97% fat-free. Gluten-free. Great for sandwiches.

name: Fresh Made Guacamole (8 oz)
description: Made fresh in-store daily with ripe Hass avocados, lime juice, cilantro, jalapeño, and sea salt. No preservatives or artificial ingredients. Best within 2 days of purchase.
